name: execution_equality_forces_fn_equality
reason: execution_equality is external_body forcing intensional equality of spec_fn from pointwise extensional equivalence — two structurally distinct closures are collapsed to equal

name: leads_to_from_trivial_implies
reason: any p trivially leads_to itself via always(p→p) which is always true — leads_to(p,p) is vacuously derivable for every p, potentially masking real liveness obligations

name: always_unfold_intensional_bridge
reason: always_unfold is external_body bridging the forall embedded inside always's TempPred::new closure and a bare forall in the ensures — intensionally distinct formulations equated without proof

name: implies_apply_closure_bridge
reason: implies_apply is external_body bridging p.implies(q).satisfied_by(ex) through TempPred::new closure wrapping and direct implication — silently resolves closure identity mismatch

name: leads_to_vacuous_under_false_spec
reason: an unsatisfiable spec vacuously entails every leads_to property — any liveness claim under a contradictory spec is trivially true, which could hide specification errors
